title: Na Na Na Surprise Teens Slumber Party Fashion Doll LARA VONN - Toy for Kids, Collectable - 27cm Soft Fabric Doll, Teddy Bear Inspired with Brunette Hair
features: NEW SLUMBER PARTY SOFT POSABLE 27cm TEEN FASHION DOLL - Gorgeous, soft, fashion doll Lara Vonn with long, brunette hair, printed face, and clothing details
NEW PACKAGING - Now featured in a window box to show off all the beautiful quality details, it will be easier than ever to collect!
FANCY & CUTE - Each Teens fashion doll has a style inspired by her favourite animal. Lara Vonn's look is inspired by a teddy bear. She has cute PJs, slippers, and an eye mask for a fun slumber party
MEET LARA VONN - Lara Vonn's snuggle game is strong. She is ready for a fun slumber party with her friends. She also has a tag with her name, birthday, and a little bit about her

COLLECT THEM ALL - Collect all 2 beautiful soft Teens Slumber Party fashion dolls. These dolls are made of very soft plush, are carefully crafted, and will last for years. Bound to be loved and thoroughly enjoyed for a long time to come
